outfit_info.outfit_description: A charming layered ensemble features a delicate pink dress under a cozy knit vest, paired with light wash jeans and warm cream boots. A striped sun hat and a sweet pink bucket bag complete this whimsical and comfortable look, ideal for a cheerful outdoor adventure.

model_attributes.body: A young girl with a slender build and healthy appearance, radiating youthful joy and confidence.
model_attributes.pose: Standing facing forward with a gentle lean, arms relaxed, one hand holding the bag strap, displaying a warm smile.
model_attributes.background: A vibrant field of wildflowers at sunset, featuring a whimsical unicorn statue and a rustic signpost, creating a magical ambiance.

outfit.P00824148: yellow and white striped cotton sun hat
